math_keyboard.title: Maths keyboard
math_keyboard.body: Roots, fractions and π live here. Long-press a key for more symbols.

voice.title: Just start speaking
voice.body: Hold the mic and answer out loud. 1.5 seconds of silence means "done".

camera.title: Photo of your material
camera.body: Hold the device flat above your notes. You can shoot 1–10 pages in one go.

diagram.title: Look at the picture
diagram.body: Numbers show what to label. Tap or pinch to zoom in for more detail.

streak.title: First streak — {{count}} day!
streak.body: Practising on consecutive days builds a streak. Don't worry if you miss a day in between.
